sentences.arabic: أَخْطَأَ يُوسُفُ فِي الِامْتِحَانِ وَشَعَرَ بِالْإِحْبَاطِ.
sentences.translation: Jusuf je pogriješio na ispitu i osjetio razočaranje.
sentences.translationEn: Yusuf made mistakes on the exam and felt frustrated.

sentences.translation: Sjedio je sam i razmišljao o onome što se desilo.
sentences.translationEn: He sat alone and thought about what had happened.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ أَنْ يَدْرُسَ أَكْثَرَ فِي الْمَرَّةِ الْقَادِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Odlučio je da više uči sljedeći put.
sentences.translationEn: He decided to study more the next time.

sentences.translation: Greške nas uče i čine nas jačima.
sentences.translationEn: Mistakes teach us and make us stronger.
